title: helianthemum × petrerense
intro: Helianthemum × petrerense, also known as Rock Rose, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Cistaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of skin issues such as wounds, burns, and eczema, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rock Rose include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Rock Rose can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve for topical application, making it a valuable remedy in natural medicine.
